# One letter-combo per line for arduino:avr:leonardo builds.
# "-" means the base build with no optional letters.
# See brWheel_my/docs for what each letter enables.
# Lines here MUST fit in the ATmega32U4's 32KB flash - CI verifies this on every push.
#
# Pruned down from ~40 combinatorial entries to one build per genuinely distinct
# hardware setup. Per-axis invert/disable ('v') is no longer a letter at all - it's
# a software-only feature with no hardware dependency, always compiled in now, so it
# no longer needs to double every combo below.
-
dw
dwh
dwn
dws
f
l
t
bg
xg
